'''''Star Wars Monthly''''' was the fourth iteration of [https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marvel_UK Marvel UK]’s [[Star Wars]] comic, carrying on (in terms of both contents and issue numbering) from ''[[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly]]'', with issue #159.

The series reprinted stories from [[Marvel Comics]]' American ''Star Wars'' series, along with several original tales: from issue #167, the magazine began reprinting Marvel US' adaptation of another Lucasfilm property, ''Raiders of the Lost Ark''. 

The final issue, #171, although cover-dated July 1983, was presumably published in early June. Later that month, Marvel UK published the first issue (cover-dated 22 June 1983) of new publication, ''[[Return of the Jedi Weekly]].''

*159: ''[[Blind Fury!]]'' (reprinted in ''Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds'') and [[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' 59]]
*160: [[Star Wars (1977) 60|''Star Wars'' 60]]
